records.m_Talk_ENG: Good heavens... Look who it is!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, Chief.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you been well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you been well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you been well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get me started. The Administration sent someone over, and it was a mess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't get me started. The Administration sent someone over, and it was a mess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get me started. The Administration sent someone over, and it was a mess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were asking about the Professor's whereabouts, and I was worried something might've happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were asking about the Professor's whereabouts, and I was worried something might've happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were asking about the Professor's whereabouts, and I was worried something might've happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Neither you nor your brother had been in touch lately...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Neither you nor your brother had been in touch lately...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Neither you nor your brother had been in touch lately...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I apologize. Things have been hectic lately, and I haven't had a chance to reach out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I apologize. Things have been hectic lately, and I haven't had a chance to reach out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I apologize. Things have been hectic lately, and I haven't had a chance to reach out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As for Professor Birmingham... I imagine the Administration needed his cooperation with something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As for Professor Birmingham... I imagine the Administration needed his cooperation with something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As for Professor Birmingham... I imagine the Administration needed his cooperation with something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It likely wasn't anything serious, so there's no need for concern.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It likely wasn't anything serious, so there's no need for concern.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It likely wasn't anything serious, so there's no need for concern.

records.m_Talk_ENG: True. I suppose it's not my place to worry. Just an old man meddling where he shouldn't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: True. I suppose it's not my place to worry. Just an old man meddling where he shouldn't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: True. I suppose it's not my place to worry. Just an old man meddling where he shouldn't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like anything could happen to the professor or to your brother, the captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like anything could happen to the professor or to your brother, the captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like anything could happen to the professor or to your brother, the captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you're back, how about it? Shall we gather the villagers and have a meal together?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you're back, how about it? Shall we gather the villagers and have a meal together?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. There's something urgent I need to take care of first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. There's something urgent I need to take care of first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. There's something urgent I need to take care of first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came to check the professor's residence today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came to check the professor's residence today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came to check the professor's residence today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's open. You can go in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's open. You can go in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's open. You can go in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to thank me. I appreciate you even stopping by when you're so busy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to thank me. I appreciate you even stopping by when you're so busy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to thank me. I appreciate you even stopping by when you're so busy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the Professor handed me the key saying he might not return, I feared the worst...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the Professor handed me the key saying he might not return, I feared the worst...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the Professor handed me the key saying he might not return, I feared the worst...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now that you've brought news, I can finally rest easy tonight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now that you've brought news, I can finally rest easy tonight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now that you've brought news, I can finally rest easy tonight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh dear, I've been holding up someone who's busy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh dear, I've been holding up someone who's busy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh dear, I've been holding up someone who's busy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get going. Take your time looking around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get going. Take your time looking around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get going. Take your time looking around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This doesn't feel like Sir Allen's room at all. So dusty...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This doesn't feel like Sir Allen's room at all. So dusty...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This doesn't feel like Sir Allen's room at all. So dusty...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He always said to keep it clean...
records.m_Talk_DEU: He always said to keep it clean...
records.m_Talk_FRA: He always said to keep it clean...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Focus. I didn't come here to wallow in nostalgia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Focus. I didn't come here to wallow in nostalgia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Focus. I didn't come here to wallow in nostalgia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need... to find something. Anything that could be a clue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need... to find something. Anything that could be a clue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need... to find something. Anything that could be a clue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the Qliphoth Game, rumors spread about ties between the Knights of Redemption and Red Shift...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the Qliphoth Game, rumors spread about ties between the Knights of Redemption and Red Shift...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the Qliphoth Game, rumors spread about ties between the Knights of Redemption and Red Shift...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it was Sir Allen who sponsored me and my brother into Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it was Sir Allen who sponsored me and my brother into Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it was Sir Allen who sponsored me and my brother into Blue Shift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there had been any real link, he would've sent us to Red Shift instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there had been any real link, he would've sent us to Red Shift instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there had been any real link, he would've sent us to Red Shift instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet, even with that unlikely connection... my brother came here after leaving the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, even with that unlikely connection... my brother came here after leaving the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, even with that unlikely connection... my brother came here after leaving the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was it just homesickness? Or did he follow traces of Red Shift here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was it just homesickness? Or did he follow traces of Red Shift here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was it just homesickness? Or did he follow traces of Red Shift here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't tell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't tell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't tell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hoped there'd be some clue left behind, but maybe... I was too late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hoped there'd be some clue left behind, but maybe... I was too late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hoped there'd be some clue left behind, but maybe... I was too late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-Esterosa! Are you there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-Esterosa! Are you there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-Esterosa! Are you there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief? What's going on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief? What's going on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief? What's going on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-something terrible's happening. The area's gone strange!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-something terrible's happening. The area's gone strange!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-something terrible's happening. The area's gone strange!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strange? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strange? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strange? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: People... are rising into the sky?
records.m_Talk_DEU: People... are rising into the sky?
records.m_Talk_FRA: People... are rising into the sky?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A high-level Corruption ray affecting the surroundings... This is...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A high-level Corruption ray affecting the surroundings... This is...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A high-level Corruption ray affecting the surroundings... This is...?!

records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a safety announcement for citizens from the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay indoors as much as possible, and never look up at the sky when outdoors.
